name: quesen
displayName: Quesen — Deterministic Trust & Settlement for Agents
description: Deterministic risk-decision engine + Agent Settlement Protocol (ASP/1.0) exposed as MCP tools. Zero-LLM, same-inputs-same-decision. HTTP 402 payment discipline built in.

tools.name: quesen.validate
tools.description: Deterministic pre-decision risk validation for autonomous agents. Returns PROCEED / REVIEW / SKIP with a risk_score in [0.0, 1.0], a confidence in [0.0, 1.0], and the exact conflict rules that fired.

tools.name: quesen.simulate
tools.description: Counterfactual scoring. Compare the baseline decision against a simulated decision with optional weight and threshold overrides. Sandbox only.

tools.name: quesen.report
tools.description: Post-decision outcome feedback. Accepts request_id + outcome and feeds the Conflict Matrix admission pipeline.

tools.name: quesen.health
tools.description: Liveness probe. Returns engine_version and transport metadata.

tools.name: quesen.version
tools.description: Full engine configuration — weights, thresholds, protocol version, feature flags.
